svg.title: Stacked Logistic Regression Pipeline for MNIST
svg.desc: A flowchart showing how raw MNIST pixel data passes through binary logistic regression models (one per digit), generates OOF and test probability features, and feeds into a meta logistic regression to produce the final predicted digit.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is in X_train for MNIST?')
sendPrompt('Why use StandardScaler before logistic regression?')
sendPrompt('How does GridSearchCV work in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What are out-of-fold predictions and why are they used for stacking?')
sendPrompt('Why fit the best model on the full training data after cross-validation?')
sendPrompt('What shape is meta_train and what does each column represent?')
sendPrompt('What shape is meta_test and how is it built?')
sendPrompt('How does the meta logistic regression combine the 10 binary classifiers?')
g.text: Trained on meta_train, predicts on meta_test

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What accuracy does this stacked model achieve on MNIST?')
sendPrompt('How does the predict_digit_with_confidence function work?')
sendPrompt('What does the final output look like?')
